params.name: Leaf of Yggdrasil
params.source: FAME Master Scrolls (31.5%), Fragment Crafting (20.7%), Lottery Machine (0.81%), Master Scrolls (6.5%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF), Super Treasure Map (15%), Wishing (0.75%)
params.description:
On Sep 30, 5000 BC, the young leaves of Yggdrasil were picked by humans.

On this day, Odin, the Lord of the Kingdom of Gods, hung himself from a branch of the World Tree, his flesh mutilated by the Gungnir. The splashes of God's blood stained the world tree's branches and leaves, revealing the runes that represent civilization. The Ice Kingdom's ferocious winds blew the leaves into the midgard, where they were collected by the sages among humans, and thus civilization began. As is recorded in W …
